this is looking better now

Patch Set 2:

As this is release request, only job pertinent is https://jenkins.onap.org/job/dcaegen2-services-release-merge/2/ (all the other jobs triggered should be removed with this CI change - https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/ci-management/+/103380/). 

The required version 2.0.0 docker got pushed successfully however the job reported blob uploaded was invalid? 

13:54:38 [DEPRECATION NOTICE] registry v2 schema1 support will be removed in an upcoming release. Please contact admins of the nexus3.onap.org:10002 registry NOW to avoid future disruption. More information at https://docs.docker.com/registry/spec/deprecated-schema-v1/
13:54:38 blob upload invalid: blob upload invalid
13:54:38 Build step 'Execute shell' marked build as failure

I verified with 2.0.0 version and container seems okay, but wanted to confirm.  The error reported is new, not something I've seen on other container release hence wondering if anything should be corrected in the project setup?

Patch Set 2:

Nothing needs to be done.. 
Earlier there were some timeout reports I was noticing in the nodes. 
I am thinking this might be one of them where the package was being pushed but mid push it failed to communicate with Nexus. 

Nothing needs to be done in the project. 

I also have seen similar errors when 2 jobs attempt to push the same docker image which was not the case this time. Mostly I used to see this error when doing releases manually
